items.title: Hundreds arrested in France after wild Champions League celebrations
items.summary: Thousands of officers tried to quell unrest as crowds of fans - some firing flares - celebrated PSG's victory over Arsenal.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Inspired Wembanyama helps Spurs to NBA Finals
items.summary: Victor Wembanyama bags 22 points as San Antonio Spurs defeat defending champions the Oklahoma City Thunder 111-103 to reach the NBA Finals.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo sends special gift for Rodrygo as Real Madrid star battles knee injury
items.summary: Rodrygo, sidelined by a knee injury, received a signed jersey from Cristiano Ronaldo, symbolizing support during his rehabilitation.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
